headline: Starbucks Pay Revamp Tests Link Between Barista Incentives And Margins
summary: Starbucks (NasdaqGS:SBUX) is rolling out a major compensation revamp for U.S. baristas, including a new performance-based bonus program of up to US$1,200 a year. The company is expanding tipping options on mobile and card payments and introducing weekly pay to give store partners more flexible access to earnings. The package is aimed at improving employee engagement, in store operations, and customer experience at a time of ongoing union activity and margin pressure. For investors following...
